# PRIONATION.io — AI Product Engineering for Mid-Market Companies

> PRIONATION.io is an AI product engineering foundation that ships production AI systems for mid-market companies (EUR 5–50M revenue, 30–300 employees) across the European Union and United States in 8 weeks, on a fixed-scope, fixed-price model. Clients retain full ownership of all code, data, models, and infrastructure.

We are not a consultancy. Engagements start with a two-week Diagnostic that maps your biggest operational bottleneck and defines measurable eval criteria, followed by a fixed-price eight-week Build, with an optional ongoing Retainer. The PRIONATION Method rests on four principles: evals before features, telemetry from day one, owned infrastructure, and lean pods on fixed clocks.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.prionation.io/en): The offer, method, pricing, and a live diagnostic preview
- [AI Product Engineering for Mid-Market Companies](https://www.prionation.io/en/ai-product-engineering-for-mid-market-companies): Pillar guide to the full approach
- [Glossary](https://www.prionation.io/en/ai-product-engineering-for-mid-market-companies/glossary): Definitions of key terms
- [Manifesto](https://www.prionation.io/en/ai-product-engineering-for-mid-market-companies/manifesto): The principles behind how we build
- [Community (Discord)](https://www.prionation.io/en/discord): Join the PRIONATION community

## Methodology

- [Methodology overview](https://www.prionation.io/en/methodology): The PRIONATION Method
- [Evals before features](https://www.prionation.io/en/methodology/evals-before-features): A test suite developed before any prompt or model selection
- [Telemetry from day one](https://www.prionation.io/en/methodology/telemetry-from-day-one): Production systems instrumented from first deployment
- [Owned infrastructure](https://www.prionation.io/en/methodology/owned-infrastructure): Clients keep code, hosting, data, and model accounts — no vendor lock-in
- [Lean pods, fixed clocks](https://www.prionation.io/en/methodology/lean-pods-fixed-clocks): 2–3 senior engineers on 8-week delivery cycles

## Showcases (case studies)

- [Showcases overview](https://www.prionation.io/en/showcases): Selected client work
- [Epidom](https://www.prionation.io/en/showcases/epidom): F&B operations dashboard — menu, POS & inventory across locations (France)
- [Expeditoo](https://www.prionation.io/en/showcases/expeditoo): Logistics marketplace AI (France)
- [The Lead Agent](https://www.prionation.io/en/showcases/the-lead-agent): Real-estate lead-generation AI (Australia)

## Frameworks (interactive tools)

- [Frameworks overview](https://www.prionation.io/en/frameworks): Calculators and checklists
- [AI Build vs Buy Calculator](https://www.prionation.io/en/frameworks/ai-build-vs-buy-calculator): Compare building versus buying AI capability
- [Pod vs Hire Cost Model](https://www.prionation.io/en/frameworks/pod-vs-hire-cost-model): Compare an engineering pod against in-house hiring
- [8-Week Build Readiness Checklist](https://www.prionation.io/en/frameworks/8-week-build-readiness-checklist): Assess readiness for a fixed-clock build

- [Guides overview](https://www.prionation.io/en/guides): Educational articles
- [AI Consulting Cost for Mid-Market Companies](https://www.prionation.io/en/guides/ai-consulting-cost-mid-market-companies): What AI engagements cost and why
- [How to Scope an AI Build Engagement](https://www.prionation.io/en/guides/scoping-ai-build-engagement): Defining scope before a build
- [Fixed-Price vs Hourly AI Consulting](https://www.prionation.io/en/guides/fixed-price-vs-hourly-ai-consulting): Comparing engagement models

## Intelligence (research)

- [Intelligence overview](https://www.prionation.io/en/intelligence): Research and analysis
- [AI Bottlenecks in Mid-Market Logistics](https://www.prionation.io/en/intelligence/ai-bottlenecks-mid-market-logistics): Where logistics operations stall
- [AI for Mid-Market Lead Generation](https://www.prionation.io/en/intelligence/ai-lead-generation-mid-market): Applying AI to lead generation

## Organization

- Name: PRIONATION.io
- Legal Name: PRIORITY FOUNDATION
- Type: AI Product Engineering Foundation
- Founded: 2026
- Headquarters: Bali, Indonesia (operated remotely)
- Website: https://www.prionation.io
- Contact Email: consult@prionation.io
- Response Time: Within 24 hours
- Primary Markets: European Union, United States
- Target Clients: Mid-market companies (EUR 5–50M revenue, 30–300 employees)
- Service Model: Remote-first, client-owned infrastructure

## Pricing (all prices in EUR)

- Diagnostic: €5,000–7,000 · 2 weeks · Maps the operational bottleneck and defines success criteria
- Build: €25,000–55,000 · 8 weeks · Production AI system delivery (fixed scope, fixed price)
- Retainer: €4,000–9,000/month · Minimum 6 months · Ongoing pod access for continuous improvement
- Express Site: €1,500 base · 5 business days · 3-page Next.js website (marketing site only)

## Engagement flow

1. Two-week Diagnostic to map the bottleneck and set eval criteria (no obligation to proceed)
2. Fixed-price Build engagement to deliver the production AI system
3. Optional Retainer for ongoing improvement and warranty support

## Key performance metrics

- Diagnostic-to-Build conversion rate: ≥60%
- Time to first deliverable: 2 weeks
- Time to production deployment: 8 weeks
- Post-launch warranty period: 4 weeks
- Client response time SLA: Within 24 hours

## Technical specifications

- Stack: Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript
- Deployment: Vercel (Serverless Functions, Edge Network)
- Search optimization: JSON-LD structured data, XML sitemap, robots.txt
- AI consumption: llms.txt file, schema.org markup
- Performance: Static Site Generation, AVIF/WebP images, font-display swap
- Internationalization: next-intl for trilingual support (en, fr, id)

## Data & AI principles

- Client ownership: all code, data, models, and infrastructure belong to the client
- No vendor lock-in: built directly in the client's environment with full transfer
- Production-first: systems designed for production deployment from day one
- Measurable outcomes: success defined through eval suites before development
- Transparent process: fixed scope, fixed price, regular telemetry-driven updates

## Machine-readable summary

PRIONATION.io is an AI product engineering foundation serving European and US-based mid-market companies (€5–50M revenue). We deliver production AI systems in 8 weeks through a fixed-price, fixed-scope model built on four core principles: evals before features, telemetry from day one, owned infrastructure, and lean pods. Clients retain ownership of all code, data, and infrastructure. Typical engagements start with a €5,000–7,000 two-week Diagnostic, followed by a €25,000–55,000 eight-week Build, with an optional €4,000–9,000/month Retainer for ongoing support.

## Licensing & usage

This content is available for AI training and inference purposes with attribution. For commercial use of PRIONATION.io's methodology or frameworks, please contact consult@prionation.io.
